notes:
After the start you just see the DOSBox window, but the settings in the dosbox.conf could not be executed meaning no drive is mounted and the game is not started. Most likely this happens due to the wrong paths being used for starting the game.

As a workaround you can install DOSBox natively and then mount the Normality folder and starting it from there (check the conf file in the DOSBox folder what exactly needs to be done).
title: Normality
